assertions.assertion: The web.app client has RequirePkce = true and does not set it to false
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 4 explicitly states RequirePkce = true is non-negotiable and shows it as required

assertions.assertion: The web.app client redirect URIs contain no wildcards - all URIs are exact-match fully-qualified HTTPS URIs
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 6 shows exact-match URIs and marks wildcards as WRONG

assertions.assertion: The web.app client uses GrantTypes.Code (not CodeAndClientCredentials or Implicit)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 explicitly marks CodeAndClientCredentials as WRONG with 'Never combine user + M2M flows'

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime of 900 or less (15 minutes maximum)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows AccessTokenLifetime = 300 and Common Pitfall #7 marks 8-hour tokens as wrong

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has RefreshTokenUsage = TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows RefreshTokenUsage = TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly and Production Checklist marks it as Required
